description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile sports car with a glossy black exterior and pronounced aerodynamic features, including a large rear wing spoiler and sculpted body panels. The car has a wide stance, low ground clearance, and prominent red-accented wheels that suggest high performance. The front end features a sharply contoured hood and aggressive headlights, while the rear is dominated by the large spoiler and slim taillights. The side profile reveals two doors, a streamlined roofline, and air intakes integrated into the bodywork. The windows are tinted, and the overall design emphasizes speed and agility. The materials appear to be primarily metal and glass, with rubber tires and some plastic or carbon fiber trim.
description: A glossy black, low-slung sports car with a large rear wing, red-accented wheels, and aggressive aerodynamic styling. The car exudes high performance and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, low nose, contoured hood, and aggressive headlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door coupe design, red-accented wheels, and large rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the large wing spoiler, slim taillights, and wide rear fenders.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the aerodynamic body lines and red-accented wheels.
attribute_wheel_design: multi-spoke black rims with red accents
